nodes.name: Webhook - Slack Approval Callback
nodes.notes: Receives Slack interactive message callbacks (approve/reject buttons)

nodes.name: Airtable - Get Unbatched Approved Invoices
nodes.notes: Gets invoices from Invoice_Log where approved=true AND payment_status is blank or Unbatched AND match_status is Perfect Match or Minor

value.details: Kreiran batch za plaćanje: {{ $('Code - Build Payment Batch').first().json.invoiceCount }} faktura, ukupno €{{ $('Code - Build Payment Batch').first().json.totalAmount.toFixed(2) }}, {{ $('Code - Build Payment Batch').first().json.vendorCount }} dobavljača

nodes.name: Gmail - Send Payment Instruction
nodes.notes: Sends HTML payment instruction email to Zoran. Update SMTP credential ID to match your n8n setup.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ replace_original: true, text: '✅ Odobreno od ' + $('Code - Build Payment Instruction Email').first().json.approvedBy + ' — ' + new Date().toLocaleString('de-DE', { timeZone: 'Europe/Belgrade' }) + '\nBatch: ' + $('Code - Build Payment Instruction Email').first().json.batchId + ' | €' + $('Code - Build Payment Instruction Email').first().json.totalAmount.toFixed(2) + '\nNalog za plaćanje poslan na email.' }) }}

value.details: Batch odobren. Nalog za plaćanje poslan na email. {{ $('Code - Build Payment Instruction Email').first().json.invoiceCount }} faktura.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ replace_original: true, text: '❌ Odbijeno od ' + $json.rejectedBy + ' — ' + new Date().toLocaleString('de-DE', { timeZone: 'Europe/Belgrade' }) + '\nBatch: ' + $json.batchId + ' | €' + $json.totalAmount.toFixed(2) + '\nFakture vraćene u status Unbatched.' }) }}

value.details: Batch odbijen. {{ $json.invoiceCount }} faktura vraćeno u status Unbatched.

nodes.name: No Operation - No Invoices
nodes.notes: No unbatched invoices found — workflow ends gracefully
